name: Code Reviewer
description: Reviews TypeScript source code quality, architecture, and patterns via LLM, then generates a prioritised refactoring plan.

checks.prompt:
Review the TypeScript packages in the directory listing below for code quality, type safety, separation of concerns, and naming conventions.

Directory contents:
{content}

Provide a bullet-list of specific findings. Flag any anti-patterns, type violations, or architectural concerns. Be concise and actionable.
recommendations: Review findings and prioritise the top 3 items for the next sprint
